item.title: Dump of satisfying things that satisfied me lately. Be satisfied.
item.description:
A baaaa...
Nothing like some family magic !
Pretty epic backyard catapult. A lot of faith being put into redneck science ! They have like 8-12 back up kids if it doesn’t work.
Their parents did a very good job.
Transportation mode optional ...
This kid just unlocked a lifelong hobby !
Spider-man jumps out of vehicle and helps disabled pedestrian cross the street.
Perspective ...
Dad enjoyed the most !
The POV I've been waiting for since I was a kid.
When the bees revolt.
Astonished beachgoers at the Lac de Sainte Croix film five French Canadair CL-415 firefighting planes scooping up water in quick succession to fight the wildfires in southern France.
Windmill blade catching fire due to lightning strike.
A trucker saves his fellow trucker !
Brandt vintage coin sorter !
A Glass Frog's Organs Visible Through Its Transparent Skin.
A bit of physics helps with the stump.
Cutting this pineapple.
Bolt aligner tool. Looks to be a simple but effective thing. No AI involved ...
A pack of penguins getting off the ocean.
Outline sketch of a stiletto shoe.
Tape trapped on its paw led a hedgehog in Dagestan to seek help from a passerby.
If it fits, it ships.
Unclogging a storm drain.
Some people need this invention.
Solving a puzzle....
82-year-old woman from Italy is oldest competitive pole dancer in the world.
This wallet design is very human ...
Using a tabletop hot wire cutter and a wooden jig to carve a miniature Japanese lantern out of XPS foam.
This new ship technology cuts fuel use by 30% !
Bro just walked up and hucks it in.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot
rainbowcrab95772

item.title: A$$h0le
item.description: Charlie Kirk said this in April 2023: "You will never live in a society when you have an armed citizenry and you won't have a single gun death. That is nonsense. It's drivel. But...I think it's worth it. I think it's worth to have a cost of, unfortunately, some gun deaths every single year so that we can have the Second Amendment to protect our other God-given rights. That is a prudent deal." Be careful what you wish for, Chuckie. Live by the Second Amendment, die by the Second Amendment. On August 26, 2025, Nick Fuentes said this about Charlie Kirk: "Charlie Kirk cannot call himself a Christian any more. Sorry, you've forfeited that. I do not want to hear, and you cannot allow, Charlie Kirk to go to one more public event, one more question and answer, one more 'ask me anything' without being protested, without being shouted down, without being interrogated about this. This guy goes around from campus to campus in the most artificial and phony and fake way talking about 'oh God made me very blessed that I control 500 million dollars, oh I'm so blessed, I'm so rich, and I'm so blessed and God's been so good to me'." In July 2025, Laura Loomer posted this about Charlie Kirk: "I don't ever want to hear Charlie Kirk claim he is pro-Trump ever again. After this weekend, I'd say he's revealed himself as a political opportunist and I have had a front row seat to witness the mental gymnastics of these last ten years. Lately, Charlie has decided to behave like a charlatan, claiming to be pro-Trump one day while he stabs Trump in the back the next. [Turning Point] USA was only able to thrive thanks to the generosity of President Trump. On the one-year anniversary of the assassination attempt on Trump's life, Charlie hosted Dave Smith. Dave Smith was able to speak to a bunch of conservative youth at an organization that claims to be pro-Trump. Three weeks ago, Dave Smith called for President Trump to be impeached and removed from office over his decision to blow up Iran's nuclear facilities. Charlie played both sides to the Iran issue on his show as we all saw because he wants to play to both sides of the aisle. The honorable thing to do is have a position and actually defend it to the death instead of flip-flopping. Smith said all of MAGA should 'turn on Trump and abandon him.' He said this three weeks ago. TP USA is definitely not pro-Trump. If they were, they certainly aren't any more. Out of all the incredible pro-Trump voices out there who support the president, Charlie Kirk decided to host Dave Smith? It really is shameful and I am honestly just disgusted by the non-stop flip-flopping on the right." After Kirk's death, MAGA claimed the far left was responsible for it. Are Nick Fuentes and Laura Loomer "far left," too, or are they part of the reason that some people on the right also hated Charlie Kirk? More people in MAGAland listen to them than to people on the far left. Who has more actual influence on Trump's base, Laura Loomer and Nick Fuentes or the so-called far left extremists? Are they both going to lose their "jobs" and be cancelled, too, or are they too famous/useful to MAGA for that? Just as famous and as useful to Trump as Charlie Kirk, the "back stabber" who must be "shouted down" and "interrogated" according to Fuentes and Loomer?
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: ICE Abduction For The President
item.description: https://www.reddit.com/r/EyesOnIce/comments/1v3wy65/ice_agents_detain_woman_at_sams_club_fuel_center/ https://www.reddit.com/r/somethingiswrong2024/comments/1v3yjwi/the_us_is_supposedly_ok_with_unidentified_masked/ Who's next? Being an undocumented immigrant is a civil violation, not a criminal one. Parking tickets are civil violations to put thinks into perspective. Thank your President for this.
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: Another Wildberries hit today, this time in Stavrapol
item.description: For those unaware, Wildberries is the Russian version of Amazon. I'm adding this so the concern trolls won't go "why attack civilian infrastructure?!" - the answer is because Wildberries is part of the supply chain for Russian drone parts and are actively assisting the war effort while hiding behind their civilian designation.
item.dc:creator: Snuggetchamp

item.title: GovBrief Today #538
item.description: ICE arrested more people in June than in any month in its history, and July is on pace to break that record. The agency is averaging nearly 1,600 arrests a day this month and has held as many as 70,000 people in custody on a single day this year. ICE officials privately called the crowding "insane" after 86 people filled a Manhattan holding room built for brief stays. In California, a federal judge ordered ICE to fix likely unconstitutional conditions at its Adelanto detention center. The warnings came from ICE's own memos and a federal courtroom. Four people died at Adelanto waiting for someone to fix it. I've emailed 8,342 stories over 538 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief/latest [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july22 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/grants-keywords [3] https://go.govbrief.today/snap-amazon-walmart [4] https://go.govbrief.today/spaceforce-personnel [5] https://go.govbrief.today/mali-strikes [6] https://go.govbrief.today/army-testosterone [7] https://go.govbrief.today/murrill-charges [8] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-arrests [9] https://go.govbrief.today/federal-plaza [10] https://go.govbrief.today/jordan-smith [11] https://go.govbrief.today/defense-house [12] https://go.govbrief.today/stocks-congress [13] https://go.govbrief.today/war-name [14] https://go.govbrief.today/af1-retrofit-blocked [15] https://go.govbrief.today/sm-housing [16] https://go.govbrief.today/adelanto-ice Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

20

22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Alex Kovas
To find a person who will love you for no reason, and to shower that person with reasons, that is the ultimate happiness. -Robert Brault So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Rep. Ro Khanna argues that the additional $60 billion approved for the war in Iran could instead be invested in free public college, free childcare, and healthcare coverage for seniors. It’s time to end the war and focus on investment here at home.

item.dc:creator: svardfiska

item.title: Custom 1951 Chevrolet 5700 COE-Style Car Hauler
item.description:
Dubbed COCOE for “Cab Over Cab Over Engine”, the vehicle is mounted on a General Motors P30 motorhome chassis
The cab houses seating for four trimmed in black leather
The rollback-style bed measures approximately 17′ long by 7’3″ wide
The forward cab houses a pair of bucket seats trimmed in black leather and outfitted with lap belts and under-seat storage
A leather-wrapped custom billet steering wheel has been installed atop a tilting steering column that fronts a two-tone silver-finished dash with LED lighting below
The rear portion of the cab has been outfitted with contoured bench seating for two trimmed in black leather
454ci Chevrolet V8 linked to a TH400 three-speed automatic transmission and a dually rear axle
item.dc:creator: atensioncenter

item.title: I Became the Face of Anti-Corn
item.description: That one time my face became the face of Corn Addiction... Two Things I know I will see in the comments: 1) I have to say corn. It's how social media works, if I say the actual word the apps directly shadowban you, yes it feels silly. I at least tried to make it funny in there... 2) Not my normal subtitles I know, sorry I had to use this style. Also! Go check out my Youtube, been posting up some fun stuff everyday at this point, form cosplays, to DJing, to Try-On Lingerie Hauls: https://youtube.com/shorts/f0rEZuDXt5M Also also, all my YouTube revenue goes to Trans Charities!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.dc:creator: Bruskey

item.title: Puget Sound Protagonist
item.description: Even though seeing him countless times, Scully still is unconvinced that Jimothy isn't just a racoon with a congenital defect and not a jump in evolution. After eluding both Mulder, Scully, and the local field agent played by Queen Latifah, we see Jimothy in the last scene scuttling through a wooded area approaching a large, fallen tree. He enters the hollowed out trunk to reveal a family of Jimothy-like creatures including his wife, Tessica, and their 3 cubs.
item.dc:creator: BarebackBackpack

item.title: Something you don’t see everyday
item.description: The Story, So I was working on my riverside cabin, happen to glance out the window, and lo and behold, the Alvaton bear is now in Hardcastle... not sure who's boat he commandeered. Spotted on Barren River headed towards Bowling Green
